metadata.title: FixRunResult — aggregated outcome persisted to core.fix_runs.result

description: The run-level aggregate persisted to the core.fix_runs.result JSONB column (ADR-056 D7 criterion 3, persistence boundary; src/will/governance/fix_runner.py, class FixRunResult). Heterogeneous by `kind`: `ok` and `kind` are the shared nucleus; the remaining fields are kind-specific and omitted when inapplicable (loose-superset shape, INFO severity per ADR-056 D7 — enforcement tightens as coverage matures). DISTINCT from FixResult (contracts.fix_result), which is the per-fix outcome dataclass; FixRunResult is the whole-run summary. Authority: ADR-056 D7 (#454).

kind.description: Closed vocabulary for core.fix_runs.kind — the discriminator selecting which optional fields are populated. (Field-presence is enforced today; the enum is recorded for future value-enforcement.)

ok.description: True if the run completed successfully. The result-shape nucleus shared with FixResult, ActionResult, et al.

data.description: kind=atomic — the ActionResult.data structured payload (dict | None).

duration_sec.description: kind=atomic|flow — wall-clock execution time in seconds (float | None).

flow_id.description: kind=flow — the registered Flow id that was executed (str | None).

steps.description: kind=flow — per-step summaries (ref_id, kind, ok, required, duration_sec) (list | None).

count.description: kind=modularity — total files the remediation batch touched (int | None).

successes.description: kind=modularity — count of files remediated successfully (int | None).

failures.description: kind=modularity — count of files that failed remediation (int | None).

files.description: kind=modularity — per-file remediation results (file, original_score, success, message) (list | None).
